threats.title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
threats.description: The system lacks documented authentication and authorization mechanisms. This creates an opportunity for attackers to impersonate legitimate users, potentially gaining unauthorized access to sensitive data or performing malicious actions. The absence of multi-factor authentication (MFA) and weak password policies exacerbates this risk.
threats.attack_vector: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in the authentication service, brute-force attacks against weak passwords, or credential stuffing attacks using leaked credentials from other systems.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (minimum length, complexity, regular rotation).
Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity and compromised credentials.

threats.title: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
threats.description: The system, due to a lack of input validation, is vulnerable to data injection attacks. Attackers could inject malicious code (e.g., SQL injection, XSS) into input fields, potentially compromising the database, manipulating data, or redirecting users to malicious websites.
threats.affected_component: All Input Fields (e.g., forms, API endpoints)
threats.attack_vector: Malicious input crafted by an attacker is processed without proper sanitization or validation, allowing the attacker to inject harmful code.
mitigations: Implement robust input validation and sanitization on all user inputs.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious requests.

threats.title: Exposure of Sensitive Information due to Lack of Access Controls
threats.description: Without defined data classification or granular access controls, sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users. This could occur through misconfigured permissions, insecure APIs, or vulnerabilities in the application logic.
threats.attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data due to insufficient access controls, exposing sensitive information to unauthorized users or systems.
mitigations: Implement a robust data classification scheme and apply appropriate access controls based on the sensitivity of the data.
Regularly review and update access permissions.
Utilize encryption to protect sensitive data at rest and in transit.

threats.title: Insecure API Design Leading to Privilege Escalation
threats.description: If the system utilizes APIs without proper authorization checks, attackers could exploit vulnerabilities to gain elevated privileges. This could allow them to perform actions that require administrative access or access sensitive data.
threats.attack_vector: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in the API design or implementation, allowing attackers to bypass authorization checks and gain elevated privileges.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization checks for all API requests.
Follow the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary permissions.
Regularly audit API logs for suspicious activity and unauthorized access attempts.

threats.title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Requests
threats.description: The system is vulnerable to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks if it lacks proper rate limiting and resource management. Attackers could flood the system with requests, overwhelming its resources and rendering it unavailable to legitimate users.
threats.affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, Network Infrastructure
threats.attack_vector: Attackers send a large volume of requests to the system, consuming its resources and causing it to crash or become unresponsive.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic and reduce load on the origin server.
Employ DDoS mitigation services to detect and block malicious traffic.

This creates an opportunity for attackers to impersonate legitimate users, potentially gaining unauthorized access to sensitive data or performing malicious actions. gaps: Lack of comprehensive implementation of AC-17 (Identification and Authentication), AC-20 (System and Services Acquisition), and SI-17 (Detect Malicious Attacks)
Limited coverage of CM controls (Configuration Management) and CP controls (Protection against Threats)
priorities: High: Weak Authentication Mechanism (AC-17, AU-2, AU-3, AU-6, IA-2) - Critical severity, impacts all areas. Immediate investigation and remediation required.

Medium: Insecure API Design Leading to Privilege Escalation (AC-2, AC-3, AC-6, AU-2, AU-3, AU-6, SI-7) - High severity, potential for significant damage. Requires rapid design review and implementation of robust access controls.

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class api_gateway,auth_service,core_api,database threat

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Authentication Mechanism
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Exposure of Sensitive Information due to Lack of Access Controls
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Insecure API Design Leading to Privilege Escalation
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Requests
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-400
    owasp: A05:2021
    threat_category: Denial of Service
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
